TM TimeMaxx Productivity app by Jacob Chin
Overview Support Privacy Terms
TimeMaxx

Plan your day. Max your time.

TimeMaxx is a planner that tracks your time, not just your tasks, so you can maximize your day.

Get Support Contact

What it does

TimeMaxx gives you a clearer view of your day by helping you plan in advance, track what actually happens, and compare the two.

  • Plan your day in structured blocks of time.
  • Track what you actually do as the day unfolds.
  • Compare your plan with reality side by side.

Why it’s different

Most apps track tasks. TimeMaxx tracks time.

Instead of asking what you need to do, it shows you how your day is actually spent.

Contact

For support questions, bug reports, or general inquiries, email jacobchin.builds@gmail.com.
